expectations.text: Avoids AI-slop phrases (game-changer, dive deep, let's unpack, in today's world)
expectations.evidence: none of the banned patterns appeared

expectations.text: Does not use emoji bullets (🔑 💡 🚀 ⚡ etc.)
expectations.evidence: none of the banned patterns appeared

expectations.text: Content is grounded in specific observation/moment/tension, not abstract claims
expectations.evidence: Opens with concrete filming scene, 'dropped her shoulders', specific exchange between takes

expectations.text: Length + structure fits the requested platform
expectations.evidence: 172 words with short punchy lines, LinkedIn-style paragraph spacing, ends 'That's the work.'

expectations.text: Voice is Isaac's (facilitator-filmmaker-builder), not generic thought leader
expectations.evidence: Filmmaker vocabulary, 'stop auditioning for ghosts' original phrasing, avoids thought-leader abstractions

expectations.text: Preserves the actual quoted exchange (founder's line + Isaac's redirect)
expectations.evidence: Quotes 'I hate hearing my own voice...sound performative' and 'Talk to your sister' verbatim
